title: Long Horse
description: Something creepy is watching you. Is it trying to warn you of potential danger?
body:
The Long Horse mod adds a mysterious protector to your world from the Trever Henderson Universe. This strange creature can appear in many ways and stalks the player. If you spot it, it will eventually disappear. Long Horse isn’t your enemy, it’s a guardian. When danger approaches, such as hostile monsters, Long Horse becomes aggressive toward threats and defending the player. Don’t try to fight it, it doesn’t want to harm you unless you provoke it. Just be ready... because when Long Horse appears, something will happen soon.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Is Long Horse compatible with the other Trever Henderson Mods from Zcoper?

Yes! Long Horse is compatible with all other Trever Henderson themed mods from Zcoper.

It's recommended to play them aswell when playing with the Long Horse Mod. If you see Long Horse and he tells you to prepare, it will mean that one of the other Trever Henderson Mods got triggered to activate or spawn


</details>



![Long Horse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c90714a3c6f84fdd19e8a2d1c6fe4f668a09283.png)

Long Horse is a mysterious, skeletal creature that can appear floating in the air or rising from the ground, or silently emerging behind the player at night. When spotted, it immediately vanishes and displaying the message: "Prepare..." Despite its eerie appearance, Long Horse is not hostile, unless danger is near or provoked. If a hostile entity approaches while Long Horse is near a player, it will become aggressive, attacking threats to protect the player before silently disappearing again. If you play with the other Trever Henderson Mods from Zcoper, and Long Horse tells you to prepare, it means that through looking at Long Horse activated or triggered another Trever Henderson Creature. Long Horse can also be fed with an apple to heal it, with an golden apple to heal it and also give it resistance and an enchanted golden apple to prevent it from despawning. Long Horse does not affect what happens next, but something dangerous might always be just around the corner.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
